pr_title: Fresh context per call, relax lever count to 5-7
pr_description: Each LLM call now gets a fresh `[SYSTEM, USER]` message list instead of accumulating prior assistant JSON into `chat_message_list`. This eliminates qwen3-30b's 100% consequence contamination (confirmed across 3 consecutive batches: runs 43, 50, 57) caused by calls 2/3 conditioning on prior output with no plan re-grounding. Calls 2/3 re-include the full `user_prompt` (plan documents) alongside the name-exclusion list, maintaining domain grounding. Relaxed lever count from exactly 5 to 5-7 per call (15-21 total) per user feedback — deduplication downstream handles extras, quality matters more than exact count.
